series_metadata.series_title: ABSTRACT OF ABSTRACT OF GENERAL & CLASSIFIED PROPERTY
series_metadata.series_description: Unbound volume of combined valuation of personal property with a breakdown by sub-divisions in all 88 counties.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Ten years to be kept in the dept. After 11th year to be sent to Archives with Dept. retaining ownership and provision made to annually retire the earliest volume to the Archives., Paper: Archives
